notes: confirm (when mid-mission), then CampaignOff + state 0x11

name: @CampaignMenu@4
notes: campaign menu-bar commands: 1 = restore PILOT.BKP + state 4 (replay mission), 2 = AbortCampaign

name: _CallCampaignProc@4
notes: the campaign driver: cmd 0 init, 1 = save PILOT.BKP + invoke + SeqEnd (mission start), 3 = post-mission (playerBailed test, bail zeroes the 0xbc-byte plane-roster slot at +0xdb0, home landing stores damage into the slot + repair% = dam*100/max + type+0x1b4 clamp 100, LoadCampaignStores return, stats: missions/failures/bails/wingman at +0x1f80..), 4 = debrief (dead/MIA/failed -> retry restores PILOT.BKP else save+off), 5 = end (victory appends to the campaigns-won field +0xc2), 6/8 = query, 7 = bail notify

name: CampaignProcInvoke
notes: low-level campaign-DLL call: latch __campaignFailures=DAT_004fab40 then (*_campaignProc)(cmd). Inner worker of _CallCampaignProc@4

name: _CallMissionProc@8
notes: dispatches into the mission's compiled .MC DLL proc (see MC.md); called from _MISSIONTextProc for the mission-logic handoff

name: _MISSIONSuccess@0
notes: imported by 15 shipped .MC overlays (#491); named at this VA by FA.SMS

name: MISSIONEnemiesAlive
notes: scan objects for a live enemy during the first 300 ticks (_Alive, _currentTime<300); mission start-grace test used near _AlmostHome; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: _MISSIONTextProc@16
notes: the .M mission-file interpreter (#485): whitespace-tokenizes the file via TextNextToken over a global cursor (_0x55281c/_0x5528c0), dispatches a keyword switch that reads numeric fields (TextNextNumber) and constructs the live mission — _T_AddObj per placement, then _WNGAdd (wing)/_GRPAdd (group)/_HARDLoad (loadout)/MAPAddSpecial, and _OBJAlias+_WPSetWaypoints for waypoint lists. Header directives set _layerName/_missionDLLName/_mapName/_missionHours; _CallMissionProc runs the .MC DLL

name: TextNextToken
notes: whitespace-delimited token scanner over the parse cursor DAT_0055281c..DAT_005528c0. MC.md: MISSIONTextProc tokenizer FUN_00483c90; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: TextIsDelim
notes: predicate: is char a token delimiter/whitespace (helper of TextNextToken); signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: TextNextNumber
notes: read next token and convert to integer (_StringToNumber); signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: TextTokenToValue
notes: scalar token->value conversion helper (uint->uint); low-confidence, revisit

name: _EndOfMissionStats@0
notes: end-of-mission player statistics (kills/losses/score)

name: _EndOfFortMissionStats@0
notes: end-of-mission statistics for Fort (base-assault) missions

name: _MISSIONFortDestroyed@4
notes: Fort-mission: a fort object was destroyed

name: _MISSIONFortDestroyedByFort@4
notes: Fort-mission: a fort was destroyed by another fort

name: _MISSIONFortStatus@4
notes: Fort-mission: current fort status query

name: CampaignAccumStats
notes: fold end-of-mission stats into campaign running totals (DAT_004fab44.. += DAT_0054ddc4..) via StatsAddPair. AnalyzePLT 'stats flush'; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: StatsAddPair
notes: add a fired/hit counter pair (accumulator). AnalyzePLT 'weapon accuracy accumulator'; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: StatsBucketFor
notes: resolve the per-player weapon-stat bucket for a shooter/target id (_playerId/_playerWMId). AnalyzePLT 'weapon accuracy dispatch'; signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: _ConvertPilotFiles@0
notes: pilot-file migration: 0x15b4 legacy records (pre-FA) converted field-by-field to the 0x25e0 layout and rewritten; other wrong-size files renamed to .POO

name: _CheckCD
notes: imported by 6 shipped .CAM overlays (#491); named at this VA by FA.SMS

name: _MISSIONLoadCommonResources@0
notes: loads the resources common to every mission

name: ?MISSIONFortWin@@YGDJ@Z
notes: Fort-mission win condition test

name: _MISSIONAddScore@12
notes: mission scoring accumulator (#485)

name: MISSIONPlayerSlot
notes: resolve the player-score array slot index for a computer/object id (used by _MISSIONAddScore); signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand

name: _MISSIONCheckSuccess@0
notes: per-tick mission success poll; drives _MISSIONFortWin / end-of-mission
FOREIGN: TIME game-clock update helper (QueryPerformanceCounter/__alldiv); owner = game-loop/startup
FOREIGN: FPS-counter print helper; owner = game-loop/startup

name: @BriefScreen@16
notes: briefing/debrief screen: loads <mission>.MT (fallback [section 1..3] skeleton), AddStats for debrief (+ Jane's Online JOGC stats), one of 4 random backgrounds (BRIEFSCR/SC3/SCU/SCV, DEB* for debrief), CHATKey passthrough, mouse wheel-areas -> PgUp/PgDn, MP ready-status sync (0xd brief/0xe debrief/0x1a ready), campaignState 0x13 while briefing

name: _AddStats@20
notes: compose the marked-up debrief/logbook stats text: CAMPAIGN/MISSION AVERAGES/PLAYER WINGMAN/AIRBASE/MISSION sections, kills/losses/damage/landing grade/elapsed time lines, [center]/[bold]/[underline] tags
